zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空
zh.content:
短期走势偏弱震荡，价格持续运行于20日均线下方，整体动能不足，市场多空分歧加剧，反弹缺乏持续性操作观望为主震荡

MACD指标持续位于零轴下方，动能柱走弱，显示空头占优。均线系统压制明显，价格反弹受阻于6.93一带短期难改弱势结构延续承压

当前支撑位关注6.78附近低点，若跌破可能进一步下探6.70区域。上方阻力集中在6.93及7.00整数关口需关注突破信号确认谨慎

操作建议以反弹做空或区间高抛为主，严格控制仓位，避免追涨杀跌，等待趋势明确后再顺势介入短线以轻仓为主并设置止损防范波动风险控制

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently consolidating in a very tight range, reflecting low volatility and indecision in the market. Despite a marginal 24-hour gain of 0.12%, price action remains constrained between 6.7823 and 6.8037, indicating limited directional conviction. Trading below the 20-day SMA at 6.92709 confirms a broader bearish bias, with sellers still controlling medium-term structure while momentum remains subdued overall structure remains weak.

Momentum indicators point to weakening conditions, with MACD at -0.021198920 signaling bearish pressure and no confirmed signal line value to suggest recovery. The negative reading suggests sellers dominate recent sessions. Although RSI is unavailable, price behavior below the SMA20 implies persistent downside bias. The moving average slope likely trends downward, reinforcing a cautious outlook for short-term traders. Market structure favors range downside continuation.

Key support is established near the recent low of 6.7823, with a breakdown potentially exposing 6.70 as the next downside target. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at the 20-day SMA around 6.92709, followed by a psychological level near 7.00. Price compression suggests a breakout is approaching, but direction remains unconfirmed until a decisive close beyond these levels watch volume confirmation.

Trading strategy favors a neutral-to-bearish stance while price remains below the SMA20. Short-term traders may consider range-bound scalping between 6.70 and 6.93, using tight stops above resistance. A bullish reversal would require a sustained break and close above 6.93 with volume confirmation. Until then, rallies toward resistance are more likely to face rejection than continuation. Risk management is essential in low volatility conditions.
